executiveSummary: All 6 new LTX-Video pipeline files are implemented and 955 tests pass. Two non-compliant FRs (FR-4: ltxv_empty_latent_video missing fps; FR-6: pipelines/__init__.py had no module listing) were resolved in the refactor pass. Pipelines are now organised in a video/ltx/{ltx2,ltx3}/ hierarchy mirroring comfyui_official_workflows.
minorObservations: ltx2_i2v_lora.py: base distilled LoRA strength hardcoded to 1.0 — a base_lora_strength param could be exposed in a future iteration.
ltx2_i2v.py / ltx2_i2v_distilled.py: duck-typing heuristic hasattr(image, 'mode') could fail for non-standard image objects; a deferred isinstance check would be more robust.
All 6 pipelines call check_runtime() at run() entry but ModelManager is instantiated before any file-presence check.
conclusionsAndRecommendations: All FRs and USs are now compliant post-refactor. The iteration can be merged. Remaining minor items (base_lora_strength exposure, image type check robustness) are non-blocking and can be tracked as future improvements.
